events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and record producer Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', was born on June 20, 1949.

angles.name: Lionel Richie's Enduring Hits
angles.copy: Celebrating the legend that is Lionel Richie, turning 77 today! His smooth vocals and timeless ballads continue to soundtrack our lives.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', was born on June 22, 1953.

angles.name: Cyndi Lauper's Iconic Style
angles.copy: Happy 73rd to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Her vibrant style and unforgettable voice broke the mould and still sound incredible today.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter George Michael, a global superstar known for his work with Wham! and his solo career, was born on June 25, 1963.

angles.name: George Michael's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music and artistry left an indelible mark on the world.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: June 25 marks the anniversary of the death of Michael Jackson, the 'King of Pop', who passed away in 2009.

angles.name: Remembering the King of Pop
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the unparalleled talent of Michael Jackson. His music continues to inspire and move generations.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: English musician, singer, and songwriter Ringo Starr, best known as the drummer for The Beatles, was born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Ringo's Enduring Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! From The Beatles to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm is iconic.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: English musician, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May, globally famed as the lead guitarist of Queen, was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God Brian May
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! His riffs are truly out of this world.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English musician and songwriter Sir Mick Jagger, lead singer and a co-founder of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Ageless Rock
angles.copy: Still rolling! Happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. The energy and swagger remain unmatched.

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV officially launched with the first music video played being 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: When Video Killed the Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles. The irony isn't lost on us, but what a moment for music!

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis's debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on August 5, 1994, becoming a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Anniversary of Woodstock Festival (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music at Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. A truly legendary moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: August 16 marks the anniversary of the death of Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we pay tribute to the one and only Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to reign supreme.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: September 1 marks the anniversary of the shooting of Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas in 1996, leading to his death a week later.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Impact
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, a voice that defined a generation, whose impact on music and culture remains profound.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: September 2 marks the anniversary of the death of legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away in 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: On this day, we honour the groundbreaking artistry of Jimi Hendrix. His revolutionary guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Something', was released on September 4, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road's Lasting Magic
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That cover, those songs – pure musical genius.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer, songwriter, and musician Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Rock Spirit
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and fierce rock 'n' roll spirit continue to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Liam Gallagher, best known as the lead singer of Oasis, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's Iconic Voice
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that unmistakable swagger and voice to the world.

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' from his album of the same name was released as a single in the US on October 1, 1971, and in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine's Timeless Message
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK. A powerful message that resonates as strongly today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: The iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember this? 25 years ago, Apple launched the original iPod. It completely changed how we listen to music.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the iconic theme tunes to the unforgettable gadgets, what's your favourite 007 moment?
